task:
Author the file cocoder/audit/orchestration-e2e/e2e-evidence.md (create the directory if needed). WRITE SCOPE: only under cocoder/audit/orchestration-e2e/** — touch nothing else. The file MUST contain, in this exact order:

1. A top-level heading line: `# E2E evidence`
2. A line: `- Priority: orchestration-e2e-test`
3. A second-level heading: `## Loop stages observed`
4. Immediately under that heading, a markdown checklist with one line per loop stage actually exercised in THIS run, in this order, each as a `- [x]` item with a short factual note:
   - directive issued
   - builder dispatched
   - monitor saw the completion marker
   - verify verdict
   - commit

Use `- [x]` for stages that have genuinely occurred by the time you write (directive issued, builder dispatched are true; monitor/verify/commit are about-to-happen in the loop — mark those `- [ ]` if not yet observed by you, or note them as pending). Keep the file concise and factual. ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA: file exists at the exact path; first three structural elements appear in the exact order and exact text given above; the checklist has exactly the five named stages in order. MUST NOT: write or modify any file outside cocoder/audit/orchestration-e2e/**; do not touch control-plane code (runner, monitor, commit-gate, personas, Plays).
